channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Small sinkhole on middle of the pavement, 10th July
item.description:
This sinkhole has appeared in the pavement on the path between Montagu Road and Barrowfield Close N9 can it be investigated before someone falls through it and it gets bigger as it is on a well used pathway.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Montagu Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Plate Missing, 10th July
item.description:
The street plate for Crosslet Street is missing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crosslet Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Posters and advertisements being attached to road railings, 10th July
item.description:
Banners/ advertisements being flyposted
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Square, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Communal block rubbish bins being left on pavement, 10th July
item.description:
The communal waste bins are being left on the pavement and not put out and taken back by the cleaning/collection team, and they are partially blocking the pavement and encouraging people who aren't residents to dump rubbish here. This has been going on for about a month, and was never an issue before.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Townsend Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: As you look left from Cherry Tree Walk into Eden Park Avenue the first tree has lower foliage which requires cutting back as it is obstructing vision of oncoming traffic, 10th July
item.description:
Recurring problem

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree support broken, 10th July
item.description:
The support for the tree has come out of the ground and now the tree has fallen to an angle. Needs propping up again to correct this

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mainridge Road, Chislehurst
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: We need a bin, 10th July
item.description:
There is no bin anywhere within the development. As a result people leave trash on the ground or on benches. It's also difficult for pet owners who want to pick up after their dogs and dispose. The area is heavily walked by pedestrians, especially since a shop opened on the ground floor. The nearest bin is at least 5 minutes walk away.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rossett Way, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of a freezer, 10th July
item.description:
2 houses down keep fly tipping, tonight (10/07/26) they have taken a freezer and dumped it by the recycling bins in between Tappesfield Road and Nunhead Grove. This happened at 10:03pm (between the flats)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daniels Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th July
item.description:
This has been here for weeks. Last time the fly tipping was cleared but the commercial waste bin was left which led to new fly tipping. This bin needs to go. Now someone has tipped it over. Please solve

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tabernacle Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large can-asters. Unknown material ?, 10th July
item.description:
Please remove . Colyton road . SE22 0NE .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Colyton Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over flowing bins, 10th July
item.description:
Please clear up . Over flowing bin . Hindermans road SE22

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple large rubbish piles, 10th July
item.description:
Multiple large piles of rubbish next to Evri and DPD lockers next to Londis shop and clothes drop off. This is is attracting wild animals to rip through boxes and bags and attracting further fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Close, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please remove the bed and mattress, 10th July
item.description:
This by the side of the block of flats . Opposite the East Dulwich swiming pool . SE22

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Daylight Drug Abuse, 10th July
item.description:
I feel like it is an absolute disgrace that in 2026 people just can tent up anywhere and use drugs, drink and use the common space for toilet anywhere they please and no-one does anything. In my conscious mind I cannot let this happen, as it is my very basic human right to live without drug and alcohol abuse and rubbish piling in public! I would like to hear updates soon or I will have to start making complaints and make sure that I am taken seriously. Kind regards,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Methuen Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked pavement. Been going on for a while now., 10th July
item.description:
Please have the housing association remove the obstructions from the pavement. A buggy struggled to get past with children the other day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goddard Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Northcote House/Mansions, 10th July
item.description:
There are currently roadworks happening on Heath Street resulting in complete closure of the road in this area. As a result, scooters, cyclists and motorcyclists are taking to using the pavement on either side of the road - this is clearly illegal and an accident waiting to happen. Is there something you can do to avoid the use of the payment by these vehicles?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107-111, Heath Street, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No block lighting searson house 1 - 25, 10th July
item.description:
Please restore lighting to the block as its very dark outside i live within this block and i am disabled and it is not nice having limited mobility and not being able to see as its so dark.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newington Butts, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste dumped in street, 10th July
item.description:
Been there at least a week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leak on Russel lane on plus of road going down towards Osidge lBd, 10th July
item.description:
Leak from centre of road for 2 weeks, where old and new tarmac join
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 125, Russell Lane, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant water with algae on pavement, 10th July
item.description:
Outside #96 there is constant water, despite it not raining for weeks, and the water is now green and full of debris. It's taking over the pavement, is hazardous and slippery. It looks incredibly problematic like there is a water leak somewhere although the water appears stagnant.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
